title: [3.12] GH-127953: Make line number lookup O(1) regardless of the size of the code object (GH-129127)
author: markshannon
body:
Manual backport of #129127.

This probably isn't getting merged into 3.12 (that's up to @Yhg1s), but I wanted to make available to anyone who wants it in their 3.12

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-127953 -->
* Issue: gh-127953
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: markshannon
comments.body: This has probably outlived its usefulness with the release of 3.14.
